title: HW Status Dashboard

sql.statement: SELECT count(distinct o.device_id) FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.is_deleted IS FALSE

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 3 AS min_idle_detection, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, NULL::text[] AS object_labels_filter, NOW()::timestamp AS time_to), time_params AS (SELECT p.*, p.time_to - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS time_from, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) AS start_of_selected_day, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS previous_day FROM params p), device_list AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects o CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND (tp.object_labels_filter IS NULL OR o.object_label = ANY(tp.object_labels_filter))), daily_snapshots AS (SELECT dds.device_id, dds.device_time, dds.platform_time, dds.latitude, dds.longitude, dds.speed, dds.altitude, dds.event_id, 'parked' AS moving_status, 'offline' AS connection_status, to_char(dds.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM processed_common_data.device_daily_snapshots dds CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE dds.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND dds.device_time < tp.start_of_selected_day), tracking_data_core AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states s CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE s.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND s.device_time < tp.time_to AND s.device_time >= tp.time_from AND s.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT true AND ld.moving_status = 'moving'

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, now()::timestamp AS time_to, now()::timestamp - interval '1 hour' AS time_from), device_list AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE), last_tdc AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.speed FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc JOIN params p ON TRUE JOIN device_list dl ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id WHERE tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time >= p.time_from AND tdc.device_time < p.time_to ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), statuses AS (SELECT t.device_id, t.device_time, CASE WHEN (t.speed / 100.0) > p.max_idle_speed THEN 'moving' ELSE 'stopped' END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN extract(epoch from (p.time_to - t.device_time)) / 60 <= p.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN extract(epoch from (p.time_to - t.device_time)) / 60 <= p.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END AS connection_status FROM last_tdc t JOIN params p ON TRUE) SELECT count(*) AS moving_count FROM statuses WHERE moving_status = 'stopped'

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 3 AS min_idle_detection, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, NULL::text[] AS object_labels_filter, NOW()::timestamp AS time_to), time_params AS (SELECT p.*, p.time_to - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS time_from, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) AS start_of_selected_day, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS previous_day FROM params p), device_list AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects o CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND (tp.object_labels_filter IS NULL OR o.object_label = ANY(tp.object_labels_filter))), daily_snapshots AS (SELECT dds.device_id, dds.device_time, dds.platform_time, dds.latitude, dds.longitude, dds.speed, dds.altitude, dds.event_id, 'parked' AS moving_status, 'offline' AS connection_status, to_char(dds.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM processed_common_data.device_daily_snapshots dds CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE dds.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND dds.device_time < tp.start_of_selected_day), tracking_data_core AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states s CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE s.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND s.device_time < tp.time_to AND s.device_time >= tp.time_from AND s.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT true AND ld.moving_status = 'parked'

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 3 AS min_idle_detection, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, NULL::text[] AS object_labels_filter, NOW()::timestamp AS time_to), time_params tp WHERE dds.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND dds.device_time < tp.start_of_selected_day), tracking_data_core AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states s CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE s.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND s.device_time < tp.time_to AND s.device_time >= tp.time_from AND s.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT true AND ld.connection_status = 'no signal'

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 3 AS min_idle_detection, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, NULL::text[] AS object_labels_filter, NOW()::timestamp AS time_to), time_params tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT true AND ld.connection_status = 'online'

tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT true AND ld.connection_status = 'standby'

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 3 AS min_idle_detection, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, NULL::text[] AS object_labels_filter, NOW()::timestamp AS time_to), time_params AS (SELECT p.*, p.time_to - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS time_from, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) AS start_of_selected_day, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS previous_day FROM params p), device_list AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects o CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND (tp.object_labels_filter IS NULL OR o.object_label = ANY(tp.object_labels_filter))), daily_snapshots AS (SELECT dds.device_id, dds.device_time, dds.platform_time, dds.latitude, dds.longitude, dds.speed, dds.altitude, dds.event_id, 'parked' AS moving_status, 'offline' AS connection_status, to_char(dds.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM processed_common_data.device_daily_snapshots dds CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE dds.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND dds.device_time < tp.start_of_selected_day), tracking_data_core AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states s CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE s.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND s.device_time < tp.time_to AND s.device_time >= tp.time_from AND s.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT true AND ld.connection_status = 'offline'

tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states s CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE s.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND s.device_time < tp.time_to AND s.device_time >= tp.time_from AND s.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no data' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT ld.moving_status, count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE GROUP BY ld.moving_status

ANY(tp.object_labels_filter))), daily_snapshots AS (SELECT dds.device_id, dds.device_time, dds.platform_time, dds.latitude, dds.longitude, dds.speed, dds.altitude, dds.event_id, 'parked' AS tp WHERE dds.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND dds.device_time < tp.start_of_selected_day), tracking_data_core AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT ld.connection_status, count(o.object_label) FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE GROUP BY ld.connection_status

WITH params AS (SELECT 2 AS max_idle_speed, 3 AS min_idle_detection, 1 AS gps_not_updated_min, 3 AS gps_not_updated_max, NULL::text[] AS object_labels_filter, NOW()::timestamp AS time_to), time_params AS (SELECT p.*, p.time_to - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS time_from, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) AS start_of_selected_day, DATE_TRUNC('day', p.time_to) - INTERVAL '2 hours' AS previous_day FROM params p), device_list AS (SELECT DISTINCT o.device_id FROM raw_business_data.objects o CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND (tp.object_labels_filter IS NULL OR o.object_label = ANY(tp.object_labels_filter))), daily_snapshots AS (SELECT dds.device_id, dds.device_time, dds.platform_time, dds.latitude, dds.longitude, dds.speed, dds.altitude, dds.event_id, dds.satellites, dds.gps_fix_type, dds.hdop, 'parked' AS moving_status, 'offline' AS connection_status, to_char(dds.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM processed_common_data.device_daily_snapshots dds CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE dds.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND dds.device_time < tp.start_of_selected_day), tracking_data_core AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (tdc.device_id) tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.platform_time, tdc.latitude, tdc.longitude, tdc.speed, tdc.altitude, tdc.event_id, tdc.satellites, tdc.gps_fix_type, tdc.hdop FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE tdc.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time < tp.time_to AND tdc.device_time >= tp.time_from ORDER BY tdc.device_id, tdc.device_time DESC), recent_states AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.device_id) s.device_id, s.event_id, s.device_time, s.record_added_at, s.state_name, CAST(s.value AS integer) AS is_moving FROM raw_telematics_data.states s CROSS JOIN time_params tp WHERE s.device_id IN (SELECT dl.device_id FROM device_list dl) AND s.device_time < tp.time_to AND s.device_time >= tp.time_from AND s.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND s.state_name = 'moving' ORDER BY s.device_id, s.device_time DESC), combined_data AS (SELECT dl.device_id, COALESCE(tdc.event_id, ds.event_id) AS event_id, COALESCE(tdc.platform_time, ds.platform_time) AS platform_time, COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 AS speed, COALESCE(tdc.latitude, ds.latitude) / 1e7 AS latitude, COALESCE(tdc.longitude, ds.longitude) / 1e7 AS longitude, COALESCE(tdc.altitude, ds.altitude) / 1e7 AS altitude, COALESCE(tdc.satellites, ds.satellites) AS satellites, COALESCE(tdc.gps_fix_type, ds.gps_fix_type) AS gps_fix_type, COALESCE(tdc.hdop, ds.hdop) AS hdop, COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) AS device_time, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no data' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN (COALESCE(tdc.speed, ds.speed, 0) / 100 > tp.max_idle_speed AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection) OR rs.is_moving = 1 THEN 'moving' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 < tp.min_idle_detection THEN 'stopped' ELSE 'parked' END ELSE ds.moving_status END AS moving_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) IS NULL THEN 'no signal' WHEN tdc.device_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_min THEN 'online' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tp.time_to - COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time))) / 60 <= tp.gps_not_updated_max THEN 'standby' ELSE 'offline' END ELSE ds.connection_status END AS connection_status, to_char(COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_connect_formatted FROM time_params tp CROSS JOIN device_list dl LEFT JOIN daily_snapshots ds ON dl.device_id = ds.device_id LEFT JOIN tracking_data_core tdc ON dl.device_id = tdc.device_id LEFT JOIN recent_states rs ON dl.device_id = rs.device_id AND COALESCE(tdc.device_time, ds.device_time) = rs.device_time), latest_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) * FROM combined_data ORDER BY device_id, device_time DESC NULLS LAST) SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.object_id) o.object_label, COALESCE(e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name, '—') AS driver_name, ld.moving_status, ld.connection_status, ld.last_connect_formatted, CASE WHEN ld.device_time IS NULL THEN 'no data' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ld.device_time)) / 60 < 60 THEN ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ld.device_time)) / 60)::integer || ' min' WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ld.device_time)) / 3600 < 24 THEN ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ld.device_time)) / 3600, 1) || ' h' ELSE ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ld.device_time)) / 86400, 1) || ' d' END AS freshness, ROUND(ld.latitude::numeric, 6) AS latitude, ROUND(ld.longitude::numeric, 6) AS longitude, 'https://maps.google.com/?q=' || ld.latitude || ',' || ld.longitude AS google_maps_link, COALESCE(ld.satellites, 0) AS satellites, ld.gps_fix_type, ld.hdop FROM raw_business_data.objects AS o LEFT JOIN latest_data ld ON o.device_id = ld.device_id LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.employees AS e ON o.object_id = e.object_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE ORDER BY o.object_id

WITH ranked_events AS (SELECT tdc.device_id, tdc.event_id, tdc.device_time, tdc.latitude / 1e7 AS latitude, tdc.longitude / 1e7 AS longitude, tdc.satellites, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tdc.device_id ORDER BY tdc.device_time DESC) AS rn FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core tdc WHERE tdc.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND tdc.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND tdc.device_time < NOW() AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM raw_business_data.objects o WHERE o.device_id = tdc.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE)) SELECT o.object_label, COALESCE(e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name, '—') AS driver_name, re.device_id, re.event_id, to_char(re.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS event_time, ROUND(re.latitude::numeric, 6) AS latitude, ROUND(re.longitude::numeric, 6) AS longitude, re.satellites FROM ranked_events re JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = re.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.employees e ON e.object_id = o.object_id WHERE re.rn <= 20 ORDER BY o.object_label, re.device_time DESC LIMIT 5000

SELECT lcs.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || lcs.device_id) AS object_label, lcs.sensor_label, lcs.sensor_type, ROUND(lcs.calibrated_volume::numeric, 2) AS calibrated_value, COALESCE(lcs.sensor_units, '') AS units, to_char(lcs.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_updated FROM processed_common_data.latest_calibrated_sensors lcs JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = lcs.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description sd WHERE sd.device_id = lcs.device_id AND sd.input_label = lcs.input_label AND sd.parameters IS NOT NULL AND sd.parameters->>'calc_method' IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY o.object_label, lcs.sensor_type, lcs.sensor_label LIMIT 5000

WITH bool_sensors AS (SELECT lcs.device_id, lcs.sensor_label, lcs.input_label, lcs.sensor_type, lcs.value, lcs.device_time, sd.parameters FROM processed_common_data.latest_calibrated_sensors lcs JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON sd.device_id = lcs.device_id AND sd.input_label = lcs.input_label WHERE sd.parameters IS NOT NULL AND sd.parameters->>'calc_method' IS NOT NULL) SELECT bs.device_id, COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || bs.device_id) AS object_label, bs.sensor_label, bs.sensor_type, CASE WHEN bs.parameters->>'calc_method' = 'bit_index' THEN (SELECT vt->>'title' FROM jsonb_array_elements(bs.parameters->'value_titles') AS vt WHERE (vt->>'value')::int = ((bs.value::bigint >> (bs.parameters->>'bit_index')::int) & 1)::int LIMIT 1) ELSE CASE WHEN bs.value >= 1 THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END END AS current_state, to_char(bs.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_updated FROM bool_sensors bs JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = bs.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE ORDER BY o.object_label, bs.sensor_label LIMIT 5000

WITH bool_meta AS (SELECT sd.device_id, sd.sensor_id, sd.sensor_label, COALESCE((sd.parameters->>'bit_index')::int, 0) AS bit_index, COALESCE(sd.parameters->>'calc_method', 'direct') AS calc_method FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description sd WHERE sd.parameters IS NOT NULL AND sd.parameters->>'calc_method' IS NOT NULL), hourly_states AS (SELECT s.device_id, s.object_label, bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket, MAX(CASE WHEN bm.calc_method = 'bit_index' THEN ((s.value_max::bigint >> bm.bit_index) & 1)::int ELSE CASE WHEN s.value_max >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END) AS is_active FROM processed_common_data.sensors_data_by_hours s JOIN bool_meta bm ON bm.device_id = s.device_id AND bm.sensor_id = s.sensor_id WHERE s.hour_bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND s.hour_bucket < NOW() GROUP BY s.device_id, s.object_label, bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket) SELECT COALESCE(hs.object_label, 'device_' || hs.device_id) || ' — ' || hs.sensor_label AS object_sensor_label, SUM(hs.is_active) AS active_hours FROM hourly_states hs GROUP BY hs.device_id, hs.object_label, hs.sensor_label HAVING SUM(hs.is_active) > 0 ORDER BY active_hours DESC LIMIT 50

WITH bool_meta AS (SELECT sd.device_id, sd.sensor_id, sd.sensor_label, COALESCE((sd.parameters->>'bit_index')::int, 0) AS bit_index, COALESCE(sd.parameters->>'calc_method', 'direct') AS calc_method FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description sd WHERE sd.parameters IS NOT NULL AND sd.parameters->>'calc_method' IS NOT NULL), hourly_states AS (SELECT s.device_id, s.object_label, bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket, MAX(CASE WHEN bm.calc_method = 'bit_index' THEN ((s.value_max::bigint >> bm.bit_index) & 1)::int ELSE CASE WHEN s.value_max >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END) AS is_active FROM processed_common_data.sensors_data_by_hours s JOIN bool_meta bm ON bm.device_id = s.device_id AND bm.sensor_id = s.sensor_id WHERE s.hour_bucket >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND s.hour_bucket < NOW() GROUP BY s.device_id, s.object_label, bm.sensor_label, s.hour_bucket) SELECT COALESCE(hs.object_label, 'device_' || hs.device_id) || ' — ' || hs.sensor_label AS object_sensor_label, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(hs.is_active) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS active_pct FROM hourly_states hs GROUP BY hs.device_id, hs.object_label, hs.sensor_label HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY active_pct DESC LIMIT 50

description: HW Status dashboard. Panels: 8 KPI counters (Total/Moving/Stopped/Parked/NoSignal/Online/Standby/Offline), 2 pie charts (movement + connection status), device overview table (driver, statuses, location, freshness, satellites), last 20 telemetry events per device, current sensor readings, boolean activation table, boolean active duration + percentage bar charts.
